sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Cagliari's form in the last 5 matches shows mixed results with 1 win and 4 losses, conceding an average of 2 goals per game. Venezia has shown slight improvement with 2 wins, 2 draws, and 1 loss, scoring and conceding equally at around 1.2 goals per game. This suggests Cagliari struggles defensively, while Venezia might have a slight edge in maintaining balance.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Analysis
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, both games ended 2-1, with each team winning once at home. This indicates closely contested matches with a tendency for goals on both sides. Historical data suggests a tight encounter is likely again.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Cagliari (14th, 33 points) has struggled defensively, conceding 54 goals, while Venezia (17th, 29 points) has a weaker attack with only 30 goals scored. Cagliari's home advantage and slightly better offensive output (37 goals) could play a role, but Venezia's recent resilience might keep the game close.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Cagliari is missing key defenders, which could expose their already vulnerable backline. Venezia also has absences but has shown better defensive organization in recent games. The referee's tendency to issue yellow cards (4.9 per game) and both teams' foul counts suggest a physical match.
